title: Three Lives Before Death
description: Tired of dying in hardcore? No problem! With this plugin, you have three tries before being sent to spectators.
body:
**_Three Lives Before Death_**

Adds a hardcore-like mode with three lives per player.

Players start with 3 lives, losing one each time they die. After losing all lives, death is permanent. This creates a challenging survival experience.

✨ **Features**

Players have exactly 3 lives

Each death costs one life

Notifications about remaining lives

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x and Java 21
